CREATE TABLE time_tests (test_time DateTime, test_timezone String);
SELECT timeSlot(toDateTime('2000-01-02 03:30:01', 'UTC')) AS rounded_time, test_time FROM time_tests;
SELECT t1.test_time, timeSlot(t1.test_time, t1.test_timezone) AS rounded_time FROM time_tests t1 INNER JOIN time_tests t2 ON t1.test_time = t2.test_time WHERE t1.test_timezone = 'UTC';
SELECT *, timeSlot(test_time, test_timezone) AS rounded_half_hour FROM time_tests WHERE test_time >= toDateTime('2000-01-01 00:00:00', 'UTC') AND test_time < toDateTime('2100-01-01 00:00:00', 'UTC');
